mapper.select: select cs.*, s.nickname, s.student_no from edu_course_student cs left join edu_student s on cs.student_id = s.student_id where cs.course_id = #{courseId}
select cs.*, c.course_name, c.course_code from edu_course_student cs left join edu_course c on cs.course_id = c.course_id where cs.student_id = #{studentId}
select * from edu_course_student where course_id = #{courseId} and student_id = #{studentId}

select c.course_id, c.course_name, c.course_code, c.subject_id, c.description, c.objectives, c.syllabus, c.cover_image, c.status, c.del_flag, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.remark, s.subject_name from edu_course c join edu_course_student cs on c.course_id = cs.course_id left join edu_subject s on c.subject_id = s.subject_id where c.del_flag = 0 and cs.student_id = #{studentId} order by c.create_time desc

select s.student_id, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.username, u.email, u.phone, s.student_no, s.major, s.class_name, s.student_status, s.grade, s.admission_date, s.graduation_date, cs.enrollment_date, cs.completion_status, cs.final_grade, s.create_time, s.update_time from edu_course_student cs join edu_student s on cs.student_id = s.student_id left join sys_user u on s.student_id = u.user_id where cs.course_id = #{courseId} order by cs.enrollment_date desc
